Financial narrative (next 12-36 months)

The market is still driven by the AI capex story, but the narrative is slowly broadening.

Current themes:
- AI infrastructure spending remains strong (NVDA, AVGO, MRVL, MSFT, META, ORCL).
- Large-cap earnings are still healthy.
- Valuations of many AI winners are expensive, so expectations are very high.
- International stocks are becoming more attractive because they trade at lower valuations.
- Value, industrials, energy and healthcare are seeing renewed interest as investors diversify away from crowded AI trades.
